author: potuz
content: Hello pandas, what would be an effective path to test attestation deadline at 2 seconds instead of 3?

author: barnabasbusa
content: all of these are exposed under network_params in kurtosis

content: you will have to change everything else too, as everything is % point now

author: barnabasbusa
content: dependent on what you want for the other values, adjust `attestation_due_bps_gloas: 1666` and increase the aggregate or whatever else
